capability_declaration.evidence: Sections 5 & 6 specify mandatory control modes and parameter ranges; Annex B references interconnection agreements.
capability_declaration.rationale: Defines operational capabilities through required settings but lacks explicit agentic declaration protocols or machine-readable capability statements.

bounded_authority.evidence: Sections 3-4 define voltage/frequency operating ranges; Section 6 mandates control curves and response times.
bounded_authority.rationale: Establishes strict technical bounds on autonomous operation to ensure grid stability but omits authorization lifecycle management like revocation or time limits.

decision_auditability.evidence: Section 6 requires logging of fault records, voltage/frequency events.
decision_auditability.rationale: Mandates event data recording for compliance but lacks structured requirements for autonomous decision trails with clear system-of-record attribution.

data_governance.rationale: The standard is purely technical and safety-focused; it omits all provisions regarding telemetry ownership, consent mechanisms, or archival policies relevant to agents.
